items.claim: Kamaru Usman is not fully committed to the 185-pound weight class because he is fighting at 'money weight'.
items.quote: If he's at money weight, he's not uh he's not really, you know, committed to 185.

items.claim: Chase Hooper is unreliable because he missed weight.
items.quote: he missed weight and he's like unbable because he's Chase Hooper.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan has better hands than Alberto Montes.
items.quote: Tommy McM McMillan's got better hands.

items.claim: Jos Delgado is a level or two above Austin Bashy on the feet.
items.quote: Jos Delgado's got a level or two above on the feet for him.

items.claim: JP Buys (Leos Noyani) is more damaging on the feet than Suk Hyong Co.
items.quote: More damaging on the feet, better jiu-jitsu.

items.claim: Suk Hyong Co has a wrestling advantage over JP Buys.
items.quote: I think Shakon Co might have a wrestling advantage.

items.claim: Anna Malyukova is fighting a weight class up against Dione Barbosa.
Damen Anderson is a bantamweight moving up in weight for his fight against Ezra Elliott.
items.quote: Damen Anderson is a bantamweight moving up in weight that does, you know, put a little rain on this parade.
